_description: Distilled insights from 375,094 MT5 optimization passes across 19 symbols. This file provides backtest-backed confidence levels for the auto-trading decision engine.

key_findings.finding: EURUSD and US30 dominate with Sharpe ratios >17
key_findings.implication: These should be primary trading targets with highest confidence multipliers
key_findings.action: Add EURUSD and US30 to watchlist. Assign backtest_confidence_multiplier 1.3-1.4x

key_findings.finding: Zero cross-symbol winners — no parameter set works across multiple symbols
key_findings.implication: Each symbol needs its own parameter profile. Universal parameters will underperform.
key_findings.action: Load per-symbol optimal parameters from ai_analysis.json into symbol_profiles.json

key_findings.finding: H4 and D1 timeframes are barely tested (4.1% of passes)
key_findings.implication: Our ICT pipeline's primary bias timeframe (H4) lacks backtest validation
key_findings.action: Run H4 optimizations as priority backtest task

key_findings.finding: TrendFollowingPurgeRevert EA = AMD Model pattern (accumulation → manipulation/purge → distribution/revert)
key_findings.implication: The AMD ChartFanatics strategy is already our most-tested approach
key_findings.action: Map AMD_Model strategy to TrendFollowingPurgeRevert EA parameters

key_findings.finding: StructureOTE EA on US30: 54,674 trades, PF 1.254, Sharpe 4.69
key_findings.implication: High-frequency, moderate edge. Works best as a filter, not standalone.
key_findings.action: Use StructureOTE signals as confluence confirmation, not primary entries

key_findings.implication: Extreme instruments need aggressive risk limits
key_findings.action: Cap max risk at 0.25% for instruments with historical DD >30%

key_findings.finding: SOLUSD: PF 4.224 from only 1 optimization file
key_findings.action: Flag as 'undertested' — apply 0.7x confidence multiplier until more data available

key_findings.implication: Exceptionally stable. Good for capital preservation allocation.
key_findings.action: Consider adding to watchlist for conservative trading periods

tier_1_proven.description: High confidence — extensive backtesting with excellent metrics

tier_2_strong.description: Good confidence — solid metrics with adequate testing

tier_3_moderate.description: Moderate confidence — decent PF but limited Sharpe data

tier_4_undertested.description: Low confidence — limited data or high variability
tier_4_undertested.criteria: PF > 1.5 but <10K passes or high DD

tier_5_high_risk.description: High risk — extreme profits but extreme drawdowns

TrendFollowingPurgeRevert_EA.description: Trend-following with liquidity purge (manipulation) and revert (distribution) phases

StructureOTE_EA.description: Market structure break followed by OTE (0.618-0.786 Fibonacci) entry
StructureOTE_EA.notes: High frequency (54K trades) but lower PF (1.254). Better as confluence filter.

recommended_watchlist_expansion.reason: Second best Sharpe (17.39), AMD model proven
Forex pair for PO3+OTE+ADR strategy, needs param tuning
